prestazioni: 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (330A) twin-turbocharged engine: Replace stock turbochargers with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (64mm compressor, 88mm turbine) paired with **Precision Turbo & Engine 6266** wastegates for 18 psi peak boost, supporting 750+ WHP on E85 fuel with **Injector Dynamics ID1700x** fuel injectors and **Radium Engineering** dual fuel pumps (450 LPH each).

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM CD-7** dash integration, custom-mapped for **Bosch Motorsport** 200-bar high-pressure fuel system and **Honeywell** 3.5-bar MAP sensor for precise boost control. **ARP Custom Age 625+** head studs and **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (9.5:1 compression) with **Manley H-beam** connecting rods for durability.

**KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way coilovers** with **Eibach ERS** helper springs, **Whiteline** front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and **Brembo GT 6-piston 400mm front/4-piston 380mm rear** brake kit with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **Goodridge G-Stop** stainless steel brake lines for 0.95g+ lateral grip.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Lincoln Navigator-specific) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green (212-62)** wrap, **Vorsteiner V-FF107** forged 24-inch wheels (9.5J front, 11J rear) in **Brushed Titanium** finish, and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (285/35R24 front, 325/30R24 rear).

**Seibon Carbon** hood and tailgate with **Aeromotions** active rear spoiler (3-stage, 0-15° adjustment) and **VRSF** front splitter with **Mishimoto** aluminum oil cooler ducts. **Lux HID 55W** headlights with **Morimoto XB35** projectors and **Diode Dynamics SS3** sequential turn signals.

**Forge Motorsport** billet aluminum side vents (functional, feeding **C&R Racing** intercooler core), **Akrapović Evolution Line** titanium exhaust system with **Burns Stainless** 3.5-inch mandrel-bent downpipes and **Valvetronic** electronic cutouts for backpressure-free flow.
